sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112802" key="fwka/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φωκάρχ-ης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n112802.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one of the chief officials of the Phocian city league,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">97</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">101</biblScope> </bibl> (ibid.).</sense> </entryFree>
